summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 2 - Team Lead Review Surface on mobile viewport (390x844). All backend API tests passed (12/12) and all frontend features verified working correctly.

team_lead_login.detail: teamlead@venuloq.in / test123 logs in successfully with role 'vam'

team_lead_access_acquisitions.detail: Team Lead can access GET /api/acquisitions/ and see all acquisitions

cannot_transition_from_draft.detail: Team Lead cannot transition from draft status (returns 400)

status_history_logging.detail: Status transitions log user_id, role (vam), timestamp, reason, and notes in history array

team_lead_can_reject_with_reason.detail: Team Lead can reject with reason, status changes to 'rejected'

completeness_posture_in_response.detail: Acquisition response includes completeness posture (mandatory, media, commercial, followup)

stats_row_present.detail: Stats row shows: To Review, Sent Back, Refining, Rejected with clickable stat buttons

queue_cards_display.detail: Queue cards show venue name, location, specialist name, posture pills (Fields/Media/Commercial/Notes)

posture_grid_display.detail: Posture grid shows Mandatory (Complete 8/8), Media (Missing 0 photos), Commercial (Complete 2/2), Notes/Follow-up (Partial 1/2)

capture_info_section.detail: Shows Specialist name, Capture Mode, Created date, Last Updated date

contact_section.detail: Shows Owner name, Phone, Email, Decision Maker status

venue_details_section.detail: Shows Type, Location, Address, GPS, Capacity, Setting

commercial_section.detail: Shows Pricing, Interest level (Hot/Warm/Cold), Meeting Outcome, Follow-up date

missing_items_section.detail: Shows missing mandatory fields in red, commercial in amber, follow-up in slate

activity_log_section.detail: Shows status transitions in reverse chronological order with timeline visual, includes reason in red box

action_bar_present.detail: Action bar shows Send Back, Pass to Data Team, Reject/Archive buttons (only when status=submitted_for_review)

send_back_modal.detail: Send Back opens modal with mandatory reason field (textarea) and optional notes

reject_modal.detail: Reject opens modal with mandatory reason field and optional notes

pass_to_data_team_modal.detail: Pass to Data Team opens confirmation modal with optional notes (no reason required)

specialist_sent_back_feedback.detail: Specialist dashboard shows sent-back feedback in red banner: 'Feedback: Missing photos and commercial details'

status_badges_display.detail: Dashboard shows correct status badges: Rejected (red), Sent Back (red), Refining (blue), Submitted (green), Draft (gray)

critical_code_review_comments: TeamLeadQueue.js: Well-structured mobile-first queue with stats row, posture pills, and proper data-testid attributes
TeamLeadReviewDetail.js: Comprehensive detail view with posture grid, sections, activity log timeline, and bottom-sheet action modals
acquisitions.py: Proper role-gated transitions - vam can only transition from submitted_for_review, send_back and reject require reason
SpecialistDashboard.js: Shows sent-back feedback in red banner on capture cards - excellent UX for specialist to see Team Lead feedback
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed acquisitions during backend testing for status transition verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Team Lead Review Surface fully tested and working. Routes: /team/field/review (queue), /team/field/review/{acqId} (detail). Team Lead (vam role) can: send back (reason required), pass to data team (no reason), reject (reason required). Status transitions only allowed from submitted_for_review. Specialist dashboard shows sent-back feedback in red banner. Activity log shows full history with reasons.
